tasks.subject: Task 1: Schema migration + movies queries + sqlc
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the nullable poster_path column to movies, thread it through UpsertMovie/GetMovie, and regenerate sqlc so db.Movie and UpsertMovieParams carry it.

**Files:** Create backend/migrations/0006_movie_poster.sql; Modify backend/internal/db/query/movies.sql, docs/schema.dbml; Regenerate backend/internal/db/models.go, movies.sql.go.

**Verify:** cd backend && just sqlc && just check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/migrations/0006_movie_poster.sql", "backend/internal/db/query/movies.sql", "backend/internal/db/models.go", "backend/internal/db/movies.sql.go", "docs/schema.dbml"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just sqlc && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["migration applies and reverts cleanly", "db.Movie and UpsertMovieParams gain PosterPath pgtype.Text", "just check passes", "schema.dbml documents poster_path nullable"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: TMDB client carries poster_path + posterURL helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Decode poster_path from TMDB into movieResult, and add the pure posterURL helper that builds the fixed-size (w342) image URL.

**Files:** Modify backend/tmdb.go; Test backend/tmdb_test.go.

**Verify:** cd backend && go test -run 'TestPosterURL|TestParseTMDBSearch|TestParseTMDBMovie' ./...

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/tmdb.go", "backend/tmdb_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && go test -run 'TestPosterURL|TestParseTMDBSearch|TestParseTMDBMovie' ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["movieResult/tmdbMovieJSON carry poster_path and parsers map it", "posterURL builds w342 url; empty -> nil", "unit tests pass"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: DTO + handler wiring (posterUrl in search and night)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add posterUrl to movieDTO, populate it in the search mapper and the night mapper, and store the poster path on attach. Unit-test both mapping paths.

**Files:** Modify backend/nights.go; Test backend/nights_test.go.

**Verify:** cd backend && just test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/nights.go", "backend/nights_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["movieDTO has PosterURL *string json posterUrl", "toMovieResults and movieDTOPtr emit posterUrl (null when absent)", "handler stores PosterPath via UpsertMovie", "unit tests pass"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Backend integration tests for posters
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove end-to-end (real Postgres + fake TMDB upstream) that search returns built posterUrl, attach persists the raw poster_path and the night DTO carries posterUrl, and a no-poster movie yields null.

**Files:** Modify backend/movies_integration_test.go.

**Verify:** cd backend && just test-integration

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/movies_integration_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just test-integration", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fake upstream returns poster_path incl a null-poster movie", "search posterUrl is built w342 url", "attach DTO posterUrl + stored poster_path verified", "no-poster movie yields nil posterUrl"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Mobile lib — Movie.posterUrl + parseMovie + tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add posterUrl to the Movie type and validate it in parseMovie; update all lib tests (unit + integration fixtures) so the type, runtime parsing, and just check stay consistent.

**Files:** Modify mobile/lib/movies.ts; Test mobile/lib/movies.test.ts, mobile/lib/movies.integration.test.ts, mobile/lib/nights.test.ts.

**Verify:** cd mobile && just check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/lib/movies.ts", "mobile/lib/movies.test.ts", "mobile/lib/movies.integration.test.ts", "mobile/lib/nights.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Movie has posterUrl string|null; parseMovie maps string/null/missing and rejects non-string", "all Movie/Night fixtures include posterUrl (typecheck green)", "just check passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Mobile UI — poster thumbnails on the night screen
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Render a small poster thumbnail (built-in RN Image) in both the search-result rows and the attached-movie row, with a plain placeholder box when posterUrl is null.

**Files:** Modify mobile/app/night.tsx.

**Verify:** cd mobile && just check; then just start and exercise search/attach.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/app/night.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Poster component: Image for url, plain box for null, fixed ~46x69", "appears same size in search rows and attached-movie row", "just check passes", "manual: thumbnails in search + attached; placeholder for no-poster"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
